oshi.ffm.ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable

Package
Description
oshi.ffm
Provides FFM access to system libraries and cross-platform utilities

  • Uses of ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable in oshi.ffm

    Methods in oshi.ffm with parameters of type ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static double
    ForeignFunctions.callInArenaDoubleOrDefault(ForeignFunctions.ArenaDoubleCallable callable, org.slf4j.Logger logger, org.slf4j.event.Level level, String message, double defaultValue)
    Executes a double-returning operation in a confined arena, returning a default value if the operation throws.
